response.justification: Bogdan possesses over a decade of software engineering experience, demonstrating strong domain relevance through his work on the GISCollective geospatial platform and high-scale distributed systems at Dunnhumby. Although his recent primary languages are TypeScript and DLang rather than the required modern C++ or Rust, his foundational C++ background, low-latency systems expertise, and proven adaptability make him a highly promising candidate for this routing tiling role.
strengths: Direct experience building and maintaining geospatial data platforms, notably as the founder of GISCollective.
Demonstrated ability to design low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong engineering fundamentals with a focus on test-driven development, automation, and full-stack adaptability.
concerns: Primary recent programming languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; lacks recent professional experience in modern C++ or Rust.
Geospatial experience is centered around mapping and point collection rather than explicit routing algorithms or navigation guidance.
May require a ramp-up period to transition into a purely C++ or Rust-based data pipeline environment.
